metadata.source_title: Digital risks for your financial stability

text: ABN AMRO Editorial. Cyber hygiene is indispensable for financial stability. It is not only about technical solutions such as passwords and firewalls, but also about good governance. Anyone who does not have their digital foundation in order endangers business operations, reputation and financial health. The European NIS2 directive makes digital security a task for the board.

metadata.source_title: Digital risks for your financial stability

text: Cyber hygiene is indispensable for financial stability. It is not only about technical solutions such as passwords and firewalls, but also about good governance. Anyone who does not have their digital foundation in order endangers business operations, reputation and financial health. The European NIS2 directive makes digital security a task for the board. It's about more than IT: business continuity, risks and integrity are at stake.

metadata.source_title: Digital risks for your financial stability

text: It is not only about technical solutions such as passwords and firewalls, but also about good governance. Anyone who does not have their digital foundation in order endangers business operations, reputation and financial health. The European NIS2 directive makes digital security a task for the board. It's about more than IT: business continuity, risks and integrity are at stake. A cyber incident can halt production, lose customers and lead to legal claims.

text:
It's about more than IT: business continuity, risks and integrity are at stake. A cyber incident can halt production, lose customers and lead to legal claims. Good governance also means taking responsibility for digital security. Cybersecurity is also a financial issue. Cyber security has direct consequences for financial reporting and corporate position:
Accountants test continuity in the annual accounts.
